commands.repair_reason: External PR merge should stay human-gated until contributor proof is added and maintainers consolidate it with https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/49523 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50454.; Needs attention: No supply-chain surface is added, but the patch touches workspace-isolation transcript metadata and still leaves process-global cwd fallbacks reachable.; Review finding: [P1] Use runtime... (sha=5922bf336fa5ff75ffdb060c02d4e133f1af3222)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes three session transcript header creation paths to resolve cwd from the agent workspace and adds a focused gateway regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: create a brand-new mirrored, sessions.create, or chat-created transcript while process cwd differs from the target agent workspace, and current main writes the process-global cwd into the header.
commands.review_followup: External PR merge should stay human-gated until contributor proof is added and maintainers consolidate it with https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/49523 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50454.

target.title: fix(gateway): use agent workspace dir in session transcript cwd
target.author: atran28

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
